scripts.infra:up: docker compose up -d postgres redis qdrant minio
scripts.infra:down: docker compose stop postgres redis qdrant minio
scripts.infra:logs: docker compose logs -f postgres redis qdrant minio
scripts.setup:python: sh -c 'PYTHON_BIN=$(command -v python3.12 || command -v python3.13 || command -v python3); "$PYTHON_BIN" -m venv .venv && ./.venv/bin/python -m pip install --upgrade pip && ./.venv/bin/python -m pip install -r services/parser/requirements.txt'
scripts.test:python: sh -c 'PYTHON=.venv/bin/python; if [ ! -x "$PYTHON" ]; then PYTHON=python3; fi; "$PYTHON" -m unittest discover -s services/parser -p "test_*.py"'
scripts.coverage:python: sh -c 'PYTHON=.venv/bin/python; if [ ! -x "$PYTHON" ]; then PYTHON=python3; fi; "$PYTHON" -m coverage run -m unittest discover -s services/parser -p "test_*.py" && "$PYTHON" -m coverage report'
scripts.check:python: sh -c 'PYTHON=.venv/bin/python; if [ ! -x "$PYTHON" ]; then PYTHON=python3; fi; "$PYTHON" -m py_compile services/parser/main.py services/parser/ocr.py services/parser/parser_utils.py services/parser/test_parser_utils.py services/parser/test_main.py'
scripts.verify: pnpm test && pnpm typecheck && pnpm check:python && pnpm build:web
